original_image_tags: Scan of a blank page, possibly the back of a document. Shows two hole-punch marks at the top edge and faint bleed-through text or an embossed seal from the reverse side, largely illegible. The page is otherwise blank aside from the handwritten marks and date stamp noted above.

elements.description: A very faint, almost illegible embossed or watermark-like emblem in the center, appearing to be an official seal or crest. Below it, a legible red date stamp reads '30 JUL 10 1970'. In the lower right margin, a handwritten red number '76' and a small red line are visible.

judge.reason: Description A describes a blank page with faint bleed-through text, while Description B describes specific visual elements including an embossed emblem and a legible red date stamp reading '30 JUL 10 1970'.
